name: emmy-knowledge-store
description: Ambient Emmy context lookup, durable knowledge capture, and controlled Confluence updates.

interface.shortDescription: Use Emmy shared knowledge while agents work.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Confluence-backed workflow for ambient Emmy context lookup, durable knowledge capture, fleet-safe queueing, and controlled updates to the Emmy Agent Knowledge Store.
defaultPrompt: Use the Emmy knowledge store while working this task.
Capture durable knowledge from this completed task.
